description: Voice-first dictation app with fast keyboard-driven workflows.
longDescription:
Voquill helps you capture ideas quickly with low-latency dictation and keyboard-first editing.

Use this field for longer onboarding text, compatibility notes, and guidance that should appear in the installer as plain-text paragraphs.

Enterprise deployments can include environment constraints, support expectations, and rollout notes in this area so teams can make an informed install decision before continuing.

If your app relies on optional GPU acceleration, audio interfaces, or external services, this section is also a good place to explain expected behavior when those dependencies are unavailable.
